heading: Preemption of other Federal and State programs; applicability of provisions to amendments to orders
label: 2910 Preemption of other Federal and State programs; applicability of provisions to amendments to orders
notes: Amendments1985— amended section generally, substituting administrative provisions for provisions relating to applicability of provisions to amendments to orders.Pub. L. 99–198
Effective Date of 1985 AmendmentAmendment by effective , see , set out as a note under .Pub. L. 99–198section 1601(c) of Pub. L. 99–198section 2901 of this titleJan. 1, 1986
amendments: Amendments1985— amended section generally, substituting administrative provisions for provisions relating to applicability of provisions to amendments to orders.Pub. L. 99–198
Effective Date of 1985 AmendmentAmendment by effective , see , set out as a note under .Pub. L. 99–198section 1601(c) of Pub. L. 99–198section 2901 of this titleJan. 1, 1986

children.label: a
children.text: Nothing in this chapter may be construed to preempt or supersede any other program relating to beef promotion organized and operated under the laws of the United States or any State.

children.label: b
children.text: The provisions of this chapter applicable to the order shall be applicable to amendments to the order.
